label: Loop
description: Repeat a sequence of steps N times, or run once per item in a row array (list variable). Use {{item}} and {{itemIndex}} in nested steps when looping over a list. Optional wait between iterations.

formSchema.label: Loop over list (row variable name; if set, count is ignored)
Repeat count (used when list variable is empty)
Variable name for current item (e.g. item)
Variable name for current index (e.g. itemIndex)
